security.label: Security
security.title: 8 Layers of Protection
security.subtitle: Enterprise-grade security that makes forgery mathematically impossible.
security.s1desc: SHA-256 + HMAC digital signature on every document
security.s2desc: Immutable record on Polygon — exists forever
security.s3desc: Prevents screen recordings and replay attacks
security.s4desc: Detects tampering tools, editors, and DevTools
security.s5desc: Freezes stamp when browser developer tools are opened
security.s6desc: Blocks right-click context menu to prevent inspection of security elements
security.s7desc: Prints document content only — security stamp and holographic waves are excluded
security.s8desc: Every access attempt is logged with timestamp and IP

demo.title: See It In Action
demo.label: Live Demo
demo.subtitle: A real university diploma protected by Vertifile
demo.heroSubtitle: Understand how a document becomes tamper-proof, what makes a .pvf file unique, and how verification detects forgery in real time.
demo.comparisonTitle: Verified vs. Forged — The Visual Difference
demo.comparisonSubtitle: When a document is protected by Vertifile, it looks completely different from a forged copy. Here's a side-by-side comparison:
demo.securityTitle: What Makes It Work — The 5-Layer Security
demo.securitySubtitle: Vertifile uses multiple layers of security to ensure documents cannot be forged or tampered with:
demo.step1Desc: When you upload a document, the system never reads its content. It only computes a SHA-256 cryptographic hash — a unique 64-character fingerprint. Even a single pixel change produces a completely different hash.
demo.step2Desc: The hash is signed with a server-side HMAC secret key. This signature proves the document was registered through Vertifile's servers and hasn't been self-signed or fabricated.
demo.step3Desc: The hash and signature are anchored to the Polygon blockchain — an immutable, public, decentralized ledger. Once registered, the record cannot be altered or deleted by anyone.
demo.step4Desc: A holographic verification stamp is embedded in the .pvf file. It continuously rotates and breathes — if the file is tampered with, the stamp freezes and turns red, showing "FORGED".
demo.step5Desc: The .pvf file includes DevTools detection, cross-origin iframe detection, right-click prevention, and console warnings. Any attempt to modify the file triggers security freezing.
demo.triggersSubtitle: The stamp turns to "FORGED" automatically when any of these conditions are detected:
demo.trigger1Desc: If even one byte of the original document is changed, the hash no longer matches the blockchain registry. Verification fails instantly.
demo.trigger2Desc: If browser developer tools are detected (via timing attacks and window size comparison), the stamp immediately freezes. This prevents inspect-and-edit attacks.
demo.trigger3Desc: Right-click, Ctrl+S, Ctrl+P, and drag attempts are blocked. The stamp cannot be captured in a static state — it only works as a live, running document.
demo.trigger4Desc: If the .pvf file is embedded in an iframe on another website, it detects the cross-origin context and freezes the stamp to prevent unauthorized reuse.
demo.verified2: Rotating verification stamp with green checkmark
demo.forged2: Stamp is frozen — red X instead of checkmark
demo.forged3: Large red X overlays the document
demo.formatDesc: PVF (Protected Verifiable File) is a new file format submitted to IANA for official MIME type registration (application/pvf). It's a self-contained HTML document that includes:
demo.format1Desc: Embedded as base64 (for images/PDFs) or escaped text. The content is displayed inside the file — no external dependencies needed.
demo.format2Desc: The SHA-256 hash and HMAC signature are embedded as JavaScript variables. These are verified against the server on every load.
demo.format3Desc: The animated stamp, holographic waves, and all anti-tamper detection code are built into the file. It works offline too (with local verification).
demo.privacyNotice: Privacy by design: Vertifile uses BLIND processing. The server never reads, stores, or transmits your document content. Only the cryptographic hash (fingerprint) is stored and verified. Your document stays on your device.
demo.ctaSubtitle: Protect your first document for free. See the live verification stamp in action.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.blindSummary: Vertifile never reads, accesses, or stores the content of your documents. We only process cryptographic hashes (fingerprints) of your files. Your document content never leaves your device.
privacy.notCollectDesc: We do not collect, read, store, transmit, or access the content of your documents at any point. Our BLIND processing architecture means that document content is hashed entirely on the client side. Only the resulting cryptographic fingerprint is sent to our servers. It is mathematically impossible to reconstruct document content from a hash.
privacy.storageDesc: Your data is processed and stored on cloud infrastructure located in the United States and Europe. Cryptographic hashes of your documents may be anchored on the Polygon blockchain, a public, decentralized network. No document content is ever transmitted to or stored on any server or blockchain.
privacy.legalBasisIntro: We process personal data under the following legal bases as defined in GDPR Article 6:
privacy.legalBasisContractDesc: Processing necessary to provide you with the Vertifile service, including document verification, hash generation, and blockchain registration.
privacy.legalBasisLegitDesc: Processing necessary for security monitoring, fraud prevention, abuse detection, and service improvement.
privacy.legalBasisConsentDesc: Where applicable, we obtain your consent for optional analytics and marketing communications. You may withdraw consent at any time.
privacy.cookiesIntro: We use minimal cookies for essential functionality:
privacy.cookieSessionDesc: A secure, HTTP-only cookie used to maintain your authenticated session. This cookie is essential for the service to function and expires when you log out or after a period of inactivity.
privacy.cookieLangDesc: Stores your selected language so the site displays in your preferred language on subsequent visits.
privacy.cookiesAnalytics: We may use privacy-respecting analytics to understand how our service is used. We do not use third-party advertising trackers or sell data to advertisers. No tracking cookies or marketing cookies are used.
privacy.gdprExercise: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@vertifile.com.
privacy.controllerDesc: Vertifile acts as a Data Processor when processing documents on behalf of organizations using our API. For individual users, Vertifile acts as the Data Controller. Organizations using our Enterprise plan can request a Data Processing Agreement (DPA).
privacy.blockchainErasureDesc: Document hashes anchored on the Polygon blockchain are cryptographic fingerprints that cannot be reversed to reconstruct document content. While blockchain records are immutable, the hash alone does not constitute personal data as it cannot be linked to an individual without additional information held separately by Vertifile. Upon account deletion, all linking information is permanently removed, rendering blockchain hashes anonymous.
privacy.transfersDesc: When your data is transferred outside the European Economic Area (EEA), we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place. International transfers are protected by Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission, where applicable. We evaluate the data protection laws of recipient countries and implement supplementary measures when necessary to ensure your data remains protected.
privacy.breachDesc: In the event of a data breach affecting personal data, we will notify affected users and relevant supervisory authorities within 72 hours of becoming aware of the breach, as required by GDPR Article 33. Notifications will include the nature of the breach, the likely consequences, and the measures taken to address and mitigate the breach.
privacy.privacyContactDesc: For privacy-related questions, concerns, or to exercise your data protection rights, please contact our dedicated privacy team at privacy@vertifile.com. We will respond to all privacy inquiries within 30 days.
privacy.subprocessorsNotice: We will notify Enterprise customers 30 days before adding new sub-processors.
privacy.retentionAccountDesc: Deleted within 30 days of account closure
privacy.childrenDesc: Vertifile does not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 16. If we learn that we have collected personal data from a child under 16, we will delete that information promptly. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact privacy@vertifile.com.
privacy.automatedDesc: Vertifile does not use automated decision-making or profiling that produces legal effects on users. Document verification is based solely on cryptographic hash comparison, not on document content analysis.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: Our service may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites. We encourage users to review the privacy policies of any third-party service they interact with.
privacy.changesDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Material changes will be communicated via email to registered users at least 30 days before taking effect. Continued use of the service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance. Previous versions of this policy are available upon request.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.slaDesc: Vertifile targets 99.9% uptime for all production services. Scheduled maintenance windows will be communicated at least 48 hours in advance. Service credits may be issued for downtime exceeding 0.1% in any calendar month, subject to Enterprise plan terms.
terms.forceDesc: Neither party shall be liable for failure to perform obligations due to circumstances beyond reasonable control, including but not limited to: natural disasters, war, terrorism, pandemic, government actions, power failures, internet disruptions, or third-party service outages (including blockchain network congestion or cloud provider failures).
terms.breachNotifDesc: In the event of a security breach affecting user data, Vertifile will: (a) notify affected users within 72 hours of confirmed breach discovery, (b) notify relevant supervisory authorities as required by applicable law, (c) provide a detailed incident report within 30 days, and (d) implement remediation measures. Vertifile maintains an incident response plan and conducts regular security assessments.
terms.continuityDesc: In the event Vertifile ceases operations: (a) all .pvf files remain functional as self-contained HTML documents, (b) blockchain-anchored verification records on Polygon remain permanently accessible, (c) users will receive 90 days advance notice, (d) all document hashes and verification data will be exported and made available to users, and (e) the .pvf format specification will be published as open documentation.
terms.disputeDesc: Any dispute arising from these Terms shall first be submitted to good-faith mediation for a period of 30 days. If mediation fails, disputes shall be resolved by binding arbitration under the rules of the Israeli Institute of Commercial Arbitration, or alternatively through the courts of Tel Aviv-Jaffa, Israel. Israeli law shall govern these Terms.
terms.dpaDesc: Enterprise customers may request a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) that defines Vertifile's obligations as a data processor under GDPR, including: (a) scope and purpose of processing, (b) data subject rights procedures, (c) sub-processor notifications, (d) cross-border transfer mechanisms (Standard Contractual Clauses), and (e) audit rights. Contact privacy@vertifile.com to request a DPA.
terms.warrantyDesc: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.

about.heroSubtitle: Real people, building real technology to make document forgery impossible. Transparency starts with knowing who we are.
about.founderSectionSubtitle: The person behind Vertifile's mission to end document forgery.
about.founderBio: Security researcher and entrepreneur passionate about making document forgery impossible. Built Vertifile after witnessing firsthand how easy it is to forge critical documents — diplomas, medical records, legal contracts. Filed a patent for the PVF format and submitted the first IANA MIME type registration for document verification.
about.missionSubtitle: Document fraud is a global crisis hiding in plain sight.
about.missionP1: Every year, millions of forged documents circulate worldwide — fake university diplomas, altered medical records, fraudulent legal contracts. The damage is enormous: unqualified professionals in critical roles, insurance fraud costing billions, and individuals whose identities are stolen through forged paperwork.
about.missionP2: Vertifile was born from a simple realization: if we can make currency nearly impossible to counterfeit, why can't we do the same for documents? We built a cryptographic verification system that makes any document tamper-proof while keeping your content completely private.
about.blindSubtitle: Your content stays yours. Always. Our server never reads a single word.
about.blindStep1Desc: Your document is hashed locally in the browser using SHA-256. The file content never leaves your device.
about.blindStep2Desc: Only the one-way cryptographic fingerprint is sent to our servers. It is mathematically impossible to reverse.
about.blindStep3Desc: The hash is registered on blockchain, creating an immutable proof of authenticity. Zero knowledge of your content.
about.techSubtitle: Vertifile is establishing a new standard for document verification.
about.techPatentDesc: The PVF format and verification process are patent-pending with the Israeli Patent Office, establishing a new standard for document protection.
about.techMimeDesc: We submitted the first IANA MIME type registration for document verification (application/pvf), so .pvf files are recognized by browsers and operating systems worldwide.
about.techBlockchainDesc: Every document hash is permanently recorded on Polygon blockchain, creating an immutable, publicly auditable trail that exists forever.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we build.
about.value1Desc: Eight layers of cryptographic protection, blockchain anchoring, and live anti-forgery stamps make document tampering impossible.
about.value2Desc: We architected our entire system so we never have access to your document content. Privacy is not a feature — it is the foundation.
about.value3Desc: Every verification is publicly auditable on the blockchain. Our process is open, our records are immutable, and our integrity is verifiable.
about.value4Desc: From patented file formats to IANA-registered MIME types, we push the boundaries of what document verification can be.
about.blindBoxDesc: When you upload a document to Vertifile, our system computes the SHA-256 cryptographic hash entirely on your device. Only this one-way fingerprint is sent to our servers. It is mathematically impossible to reconstruct any document content from the hash. Your files, your data, your privacy.
about.originTitle: Born in Israel, Built for the World
about.originSubtitle: Founded in 2026 to solve document forgery at scale.
about.originP1: Vertifile was founded in 2026 in Israel by a team of security and cryptography experts who witnessed firsthand the damage caused by document forgery — from fake diplomas to forged medical records and fraudulent contracts.
about.originP2: We built a solution that combines cryptographic signatures, blockchain immutability, and dynamic holographic stamps to create a new standard for document trust. Our blind processing architecture ensures privacy is never compromised.
about.ctaSubtitle: Start protecting your documents with Vertifile today.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have a question, need support, or want to explore a partnership? We would love to hear from you.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.enterpriseBannerDesc: Looking for custom plans, API access, or white-label solutions?
contact.faqSubtitle: Quick answers to common questions about Vertifile.
contact.faq1a: A PVF (Protected Vertifile) is a tamper-proof document format that embeds a cryptographic signature and a live animated holographic stamp. It opens in any browser and can be verified by anyone without special software or an account.
contact.faq2a: Yes. The Free plan includes up to 25 documents per month with unlimited download, share, and verification. Paid plans (Pro at $19/month, Business at $12/seat/month) add custom branding, larger limits, team accounts, and API access. Enterprise plans are custom-priced.
contact.faq3a: Yes. Vertifile provides a RESTful API with SDKs for Node.js, Python, Java, and Go. You can protect and verify documents programmatically, set up webhooks, and integrate with your existing systems. Visit our developer documentation for details.
contact.faq4q: Can you see the content of my documents?
contact.faq4a: No. Vertifile uses BLIND processing, which means we never read, access, or store the content of your documents. Only a cryptographic hash (fingerprint) is computed on your device and sent to our servers. It is mathematically impossible to reconstruct a document from its hash.
contact.faq5a: When a document is protected, its cryptographic hash is registered on the Polygon blockchain, creating an immutable, publicly auditable record. During verification, the hash is compared against the blockchain record. Any tampering is instantly detected because the hash will no longer match.
contact.ctaSubtitle: Custom plans, API access, white-label solutions, and dedicated support for your organization.

pricing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Vertifile pricing and plans.
pricing.faq1q: Can I try before I buy?
pricing.faq1a: Yes! Our Free plan lets you upload up to 25 documents per month, download, share, and verify them -- all at no cost. The stamp carries Vertifile branding on the free tier. Upgrade to Pro or Business for custom branding and higher limits.
pricing.faq2a: Vertifile supports PDF, JPEG, PNG, and text files. Any document you upload is converted into a tamper-proof .pvf file that can be viewed in any modern browser.
pricing.faq3a: Pro plans are billed monthly. You can cancel at any time with no cancellation fees. Enterprise plans are billed annually with custom terms tailored to your organization.
pricing.faq4q: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
pricing.faq4a: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
pricing.faq5a: Security is our top priority. Vertifile uses blind processing, meaning we never read or store your document content. Every document is protected with HMAC-SHA256 and optionally anchored to the Polygon blockchain.

q.howProtect: How do I protect a document?
q.howVerify: How do I verify a document I received?
q.install: Do I need to install anything?
q.shutdown: What happens if Vertifile shuts down?
q.api: How do I integrate the API?
q.dpa: Do you have a Data Processing Agreement (DPA)?

a.whatIsVertifile: Vertifile is a document anti-forgery platform. It takes any document (PDF, image, text) and creates a tamper-proof .pvf file with a live holographic stamp that freezes red if the document is altered.
a.whatIsPvf: A Protected Verified File — a self-contained HTML document that includes the original file, cryptographic signature, and animated verification stamp. Opens in any browser.
a.howProtect: Go to vertifile.com/upload, sign in or create an account, drag your file (PDF, image, or text), wait 10 seconds, and download your .pvf file.
a.howVerify: Go to vertifile.com/verify, drag the .pvf file to the upload zone. If the stamp spins green, it's authentic. If the stamp freezes red, it's been tampered with.
a.install: No. .pvf files open in any modern browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge). For a better experience, download the free PVF Viewer desktop app.
a.readDocs: No. Vertifile uses BLIND Processing — the server never reads, accesses, or stores your document content. Only a cryptographic hash (fingerprint) is computed. Your document stays on your device.
a.layers: SHA-256 Hash (document fingerprint), HMAC-SHA256 Signature (server-signed), 5-Minute Token Refresh, Code Integrity Hash, Chained Token (binds all parameters), Anti-DevTools Detection, JavaScript Obfuscation, Holographic Animated Stamp, Polygon Blockchain Anchoring.
a.dataStored: Cryptographic hashes are stored on US/EU cloud infrastructure (Render + Neon PostgreSQL). Document content is never stored on our servers. Blockchain records are on Polygon (decentralized).
a.shutdown: Your .pvf files remain functional — they're self-contained HTML documents. Blockchain records on Polygon remain permanently accessible. We commit to 90 days advance notice.
a.cost: Free: $0/month — 5 documents. Pro: $29/month — 100 documents. Pro+: $79/month — 1,000 documents. Enterprise: Custom pricing — unlimited documents, white-label, SLA.
a.trial: Yes! The Free plan lets you protect 5 documents at no cost. Pro plan includes a 14-day free trial.
a.cancel: Yes. No long-term contracts. Cancel anytime from your dashboard.
a.formats: PDF, PNG, JPG/JPEG, TXT. Up to 50MB per file.
a.api: See our API documentation. Quick start: send a POST request to /api/create-pvf with your API key and the file to protect.
a.customize: Yes! Pro and Enterprise users can add their organization logo, brand color, and custom stamp text through the Branding settings.
a.offline: The .pvf file displays the document offline. Full verification requires an internet connection to check the server-side hash.
a.legalRecognition: The .pvf format has a patent pending with the Israeli Patent Office and an IANA MIME type registration pending. While no Israeli court has ruled on .pvf specifically, it provides strong cryptographic evidence of document authenticity.
a.gdpr: Yes. We process data under GDPR Article 6 legal bases (contract performance, legitimate interest, consent). We offer DPA agreements for Enterprise customers.
a.dpa: Yes. Enterprise customers can request a DPA at privacy@vertifile.com.

blog.label: From Our Blog
blog.heroTitle: Insights on Document Security, Verification & Anti-Fraud
blog.heroSub: Deep dives into verification technology, the fight against forgery, and the future of trusted documents.

post1.title: Why Document Forgery Is a Growing Crisis — and What We Can Do About It
post1.excerpt: Every year, millions of forged documents circulate worldwide. From fake diplomas to altered medical records, document fraud undermines trust across every industry.

post2.title: Why PDF Signatures Are Not Enough — And What Comes Next
post2.excerpt: The documents you trust most might be the easiest to forge. PDF signatures verify who signed a document, not whether it was changed after. Learn how tamper-proof .pvf files solve document fraud for good.
post2.author: Zur Halfon

blind.title: What Is BLIND Processing?
blind.excerpt: Vertifile never sees your content. BLIND processing means documents are hashed and sealed locally before any data leaves your device — true privacy-first verification with zero knowledge of what you protect.

fraud.title: The $21 Billion Problem: Document Fraud in 2026
fraud.excerpt: Document fraud costs businesses and governments over $21 billion annually. AI-generated forgeries are becoming undetectable to the human eye. Here is why the old defenses no longer work.

sigs.title: Why Digital Signatures Aren't Enough
sigs.excerpt: Digital signatures prove who signed a document — but not whether it was altered after. Verification and signing are two fundamentally different problems, and most solutions only solve one.

newsletter.title: Get Document Security Insights
newsletter.sub: Join our newsletter for expert analysis on document verification, fraud prevention, and industry updates.

help.title: Help & Support
help.faq1q: What happens if someone alters a protected document?
help.faq1a: If a document has been altered after Vertifile protection was applied, the verification will fail immediately. The holographic stamp freezes red and displays a "FORGED" warning.
help.faq2a: A PVF (Protected Verification File) is Vertifile's proprietary format that bundles your original document with cryptographic verification data and a holographic stamp.
help.faq3q: How does Vertifile protect my documents?
help.faq3a: Vertifile creates a unique cryptographic hash and embeds it with a holographic verification stamp containing blockchain-backed digital signatures.
help.faq4a: Vertifile supports PDF, images (PNG, JPG, TIFF), text files (TXT), and Word documents (DOCX). Maximum file size is 50MB.
help.faq5q: How do I share a protected document?
help.faq5a: From the Documents tab, use the actions menu on any document and select "Copy Share Link." Track opens from your dashboard.
help.supportDesc: Our support team is happy to help.

topbar.notifDocVerifiedText: A document was verified by a third party
topbar.notifPlanLimitText: You've used 80% of your monthly document quota

zk.label: Zero-Knowledge
zk.title: Zero Knowledge. Full Control.
zk.subtitle: Vertifile is Zero-Knowledge — we cannot read your documents even if we wanted to. Even if forced to.
zk.card1desc: Your documents are encrypted with AES-256-GCM directly in the browser, before they ever leave your computer. What reaches our servers is unreadable code.
zk.card2title: The Key Stays With You — Always
zk.card2desc: The encryption key is transmitted only via URL Fragment — a part of the address that is never sent to the server. No one besides you and the recipient can open the document.
zk.card3desc: Every document is signed with a dual digital signature: Ed25519 for sender identity and HMAC for content integrity. Any change, no matter how small, is detected instantly.
zk.card4desc: Compliant with GDPR, HIPAA and international privacy standards. When the server cannot read — there is nothing to leak, nothing to breach, nothing to expose.
zk.before1: Documents sent via email with no protection
zk.before2: Every server that relays the file can read it
zk.before3: No way to know if someone altered the content
zk.before4: Cloud platforms keep a readable copy
zk.before5: Data leak = business and legal disaster
zk.after2: The server relays — but cannot read
zk.after3: Dual signature detects any change instantly
zk.after4: The encryption key never leaves the browser
zk.after5: Even in a breach — there is nothing to steal

support.heroSub: Find answers, guides, and resources to help you get the most out of Vertifile document protection.
support.quickLinksSub: Jump straight to what you need.
support.cardStartDesc: Set up your account and protect your first document.
support.cardFaqDesc: Answers to the most common questions.
support.cardContactDesc: Reach our team for personalized help.
support.topicsSub: Browse our most popular help articles.
support.topic1q: How to upload and protect a document
support.topic1a: Go to Upload, sign in to your account, then drag and drop your file (PDF, image, or text). The system will compute a cryptographic fingerprint, embed a holographic stamp, and generate your .pvf file in seconds. You can then download or share the protected document.
support.topic2a: The PVF stamp is an animated holographic element embedded in every protected document. When the stamp rotates with green waves, the document is verified as authentic. If the stamp freezes and turns red, it means the document has been tampered with. Learn more on our demo page.
support.topic3a: Pro and Enterprise users can customize the verification stamp with their organization's logo, brand colors, and wave patterns. Go to your Dashboard and navigate to the "My Stamp" section to configure your branding. Changes apply to all future documents automatically.
support.topic4a: Vertifile uses BLIND processing, meaning the server never reads or stores your document content. When you share a .pvf file, only the cryptographic fingerprint is verified server-side. The document content remains encrypted and visible only to the recipient who opens the file in their browser.
support.topic5a: To verify a document, go to Verify and drag the .pvf file into the upload zone. The system will check the cryptographic signature against the blockchain registry. A green spinning stamp means authentic; a frozen red stamp means the document was tampered with.
support.topic6a: Access your account settings from the Dashboard. You can update your profile, change your password, manage your subscription plan, view usage statistics, and configure API keys. Enterprise users can also manage team members and organization settings.
support.topic7a: Integrate Vertifile into your application using our REST API. Send a POST request to /api/create-pvf with your API key and file to protect. See the full API documentation for endpoints, authentication, rate limits, and code examples.
support.ctaDesc: Our team is here to help. Reach out via email or our contact form and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
